content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

The amendment identifies a real safety gap in the PR watcher’s real GitHub port.

## Votes

- `fr-4-c6aecb73`: Accept
  `ProcessPrToolPort::pr_status` always leaves `latest_push_at` unset, so the real path never uses the timestamp-based "since latest push" filtering that the helper and tests model. The fallback filters only by `commit_id`/`original_commit_id` matching the observed head SHA, which can miss post-push review comments anchored to older commits or diff positions. That creates a plausible false-negative bot-review state and can allow merge when current Codex line findings should block it. The fix should provide a real push/review watermark or equivalent created-at filtering and test the real-port behavior, not just the pure helper.
